name: NFR 5: Delete User Account (Soft Delete) — Performance Test
description: Measure performance and validate behavior when soft-deleting a user by updating status to "deactivated" via PATCH under concurrent load.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target value: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: After execution, verify integrity: deactivated users must not appear in /users/active.
